message:
test(wave-50): pure data-type coverage for scoring, response, context, ambient

Add 13 tests exercising Debug/Clone/Copy/PartialEq/Hash/Display/Default derives:
- trace/scoring: TopologicalScore, ClassId, EvidenceEntry, EvidenceLedger
- web/response: StatusCode (incl. Display+Hash), Response, Redirect, Json, Html
- observability/context: SpanId (incl. Display+Default), DiagnosticContext
- audit/ambient: AmbientFinding, AmbientCategory, Severity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
